title: abies fraseri
intro: Abies fraseri, also known as Fraser fir, is a species of evergreen tree native to the Appalachian Mountains in North America. The resin of the Fraser fir has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds. The essential oil extracted from the resin has been shown to have health benefits including reducing stress, improving respiratory function, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Fraser fir include essential oil diffusions, topical creams, and tea infusions, which can be used to promote relaxation, ease congestion, and support overall well-being.
